folio.label: 112r
folio.l: Hardere , than euäe Parys , dide Elyne
But nathelees , ©et had he gret pitee
That thilke nygút , offende hire must he
And thougút allas , o tendre creature
Now wolde god , ©e mygút wel endure
Al my corage , it is so sharp~ and kene
I am a gaast , ©e shuln it nat sustene
But god forbede , that I dide al my mygút

note.notetxt: 517 There is a pointing hand in the left margin.Est

folio.l: Now wolde god , that it were wexin nygút
And that the nygút , wolde lasten euäe moo
I wolde , that al this peeple , were a go
And finally , he dotú al his labour
As he best mygút , Sauyngö his honour
To hast hem fro the mete , in subtil wyse
The tyme cam , that resouö was to ryse
And after that , men daunce , and drynke fast
And spices , al a boute the hous , they cast
And ful of ioye and blisse , is euäy man
Al but a Squyere , hygút Damyan
Whicú carf byforn~ the knygút , ful many a day
He was so rauysshed , oon his lady , May
That for the verray peyne , he was ny wood
Al most he swelt , and swougúned as he stood
So sore hatú venus hurt hi~ , witú hire bronde
As that she bar it , daunsyngö in hire honde
And to his bed , he went hi~ hastily
Nomore of hi~ , at this tyme speke I
But there , I lete hi~ wepe I now , and pleyne
Til fresshe May , wol rewen oon his peyne
O ¹ilous fire , that in the bedstrawe bredetú
O famulere foo , that his seruyce bedetú
O säuaunt traytour , fals homly hewe
Lyke to the Naddere , in bosomö sly vntrewe
God shilde vs alle , from ©oure acqueyntaunce
O Ianuarie , dronken in plesaunce
In mariage , se how thy Damyan
Thyn owen Squyer , and thy born~ man
Entendetú , for to do the velanye
God gunte the , thyn homely foo , to spye
For in this world , nys werse pestilence
Than homely foo , al day in thy päsence
Parfourmed hatú the Sonne , his Ark diurne
No lengere may , the body of hi~ soioåne
On the orisouö , as in that latitude
Nigút witú his mantel , that is derk and rude
Gan ouä sprede , the Emysperye a boute
For whicú , departed is , this lusty route
Fror Ianuarie , witú thank oon euäy syde436last lines are crammed.ODR
